---
package: "openpipeline_spatial"
version: "v0.5.0"
title: "spatial_autocorr"
namespace: "Feature annotation"
description: "Calculate spatial autocorrelation for genes using Moran's I or Geary's C."
type: "module"
toc: false
latest: "true"
subtitle: "openpipeline_spatial v0.5.0"
---

::: {.column-margin}

### Info

ID: `spatial_autocorr`  
Namespace: `feature_annotation`

### Links

[{{< fa brands github >}} View source code](https://github.com/openpipelines-bio/openpipeline_spatial/tree/v0.5.0/src/feature_annotation/spatial_autocorr)

[![](/images/viash-hub-logo.svg){.vh-icon} Browse all versions](https://www.viash-hub.com/packages/openpipeline_spatial)

[![](/images/viash-hub-logo.svg){.vh-icon} Get run instructions](https://www.viash-hub.com/packages/openpipeline_spatial/v0.5.0/components/feature_annotation/spatial_autocorr)

:::

This allows identifying spatially variable genes


## Argument groups

### Inputs

|Name                        |Description                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |Attributes                                    |
|:----------|:--------------------------------------------------|:--------------------|
|`--input`                   |Input h5mu file.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |`file`, required                              |
|`--modality`                |Modality to use.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |`string`, default: `"rna"`                    |
|`--layer`                   |Layer in the AnnData object to use. - If `attr` is 'X', this is the key in `.layers` to use. If not provided, `.X` is used. - If `attr` is 'obsm', this is the key in `.obsm` to use.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |`string`                                      |
|`--input_genes`             |The features to calculate autocorrelation for. Meaning depends on `--attr`: - If `attr` is 'X' (default), this must be a list of gene names from `.var_names`.    If not provided, it defaults to using genes in `.var['highly_variable']` (if present), or all genes.   This behavior can be overridden by setting `--use_all_genes` to `true`.   Note: You cannot pass a column name from `.var` here. - If `attr` is 'obs', this must be a list of column names from `.obs`.  - If `attr` is 'obsm', this must be indices in `.obsm[layer]` (as strings). |List of `string`, multiple_sep: `","`         |
|`--obsp_neighborhood_graph` |Key in .obsp where spatial connectivities are stored.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |`string`, default: `"spatial_connectivities"` |
|`--use_all_genes`           |Whether to use all genes even if highly variable genes are present in .var. If set to true, all genes will be used.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |`boolean`, default: `FALSE`                   |


### Parameters

|Name        |Description                                                                                                                                                                   |Attributes                   |
|:----------|:--------------------------------------------------|:--------------------|
|`--mode`    |Mode of spatial autocorrelation.                                                                                                                                              |`string`, default: `"moran"` |
|`--attr`    |The attribute of the AnnData object to use for calculation. - 'X': Use gene expression data (default). - 'obs': Use cell metadata. - 'obsm': Use multidimensional embeddings. |`string`, default: `"X"`     |
|`--n_perms` |Number of permutations for p-value calculation.                                                                                                                               |`integer`, default: `100`    |
|`--use_raw` |Whether to use .raw attribute of AnnData.                                                                                                                                     |`boolean`, default: `FALSE`  |


### Outputs

|Name       |Description                            |Attributes       |
|:----------|:--------------------------------------------------|:--------------------|
|`--output` |Output h5mu file with results in .uns. |`file`, required |

## Example commands

You can run the pipeline using `nextflow run`.

### View help

You can use `--help` as a parameter to get an overview of the possible parameters.

```bash
nextflow run openpipelines-bio/openpipeline_spatial \
  -r v0.5.0 -latest \
  -main-script target/nextflow/feature_annotation/spatial_autocorr/main.nf \
  --help
```

### Run command

<details>
<summary>Example of `params.yaml`</summary>

Generate a `params.yaml` for this component on [Viash Hub](https://www.viash-hub.com/packages/openpipeline_spatial/v0.5.0/components/feature_annotation/spatial_autocorr).

</details>

Run locally with:

```bash
nextflow run openpipelines-bio/openpipeline_spatial \
  -r v0.5.0 -latest \
  -profile docker \
  -main-script target/nextflow/feature_annotation/spatial_autocorr/main.nf \
  -params-file params.yaml
```

:::{.callout-note}
Replace `-profile docker` with `-profile podman` or `-profile singularity` depending on the desired backend.
:::

Running on Seqera or through Viash Hub is explained in the [guides](/guides/index.qmd).
